data.body: Plan-review gate PASS signed at 73efe1e68; epic claimed in_progress by joeoakhart@navapbc.com. Accepted advisory: current decomposition creates lizard/jscpd adapters but does not register complexity/duplication metrics, so AC1 needs explicit integration work; will create and link a discovered child after defining its contract. Packaging advisory already reflected by child plans: [metrics] installs lizard only; scc and jscpd remain external PATH prerequisites and docs must say so. Non-Python fixture will be pinned to Go for adapter and E2E validation.
